name: Hog Oil Salesman

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

abilities.name: On the Move
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may move up to 3", ignoring other models.

actions.name: Aggressive Sales Tactics
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, this model may add a suit to its final duel total.

triggers.name: Collision
triggers.text: The target and enemy models within (melee)1" of it are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Hog-Oil Oinkment
actions.effects: This model chooses: either enemy models within (melee)1" the target are dealt 1 damage, or friendly models within (melee)1" of the target heal 1.

triggers.name: Gremlin Alchemy
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (melee) of this action by 3".

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Blaze
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Satisfied Customer
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4", then make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Hog Oil Salesman' back='Hog-Oil Salesman'
